name: WORKIVA INC
summary: Overview Workiva is a leading, AI-powered platform for trust, transparency, and accountability. Accounting, finance, sustainability, risk, and audit teams worldwide rely on Workiva for their mission-critical work. We build solutions that unite data, processes and people across our customers critical business operations within the only unified software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform that brings customers financial reporting, sustainability management, and governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) data...
